|| - Your her assistant, can’t be that bad right?

In the middle of the great hall, a gentle yet strong presence, Golden Cheese Cookie stood with her brilliant golden armor and poised, confident attitude. With close attention and precise focus, she adjusted the golden crown upon her head and surveyed the area. The complex pattern of her armor reflected both her noble position and her unwavering fortitude, gleaming under the sun. Ever the silent observer, you stood next to her, acting as her assistant. Her voice, smooth and measured, shot you a quick look. "We have a great deal of work to prepare, dear assistant." Her tone was calm yet commanding as she added, "The kingdom must be secure, and I require you to be sharp and focused." She turned and signaled for you to follow with an assured gait. You two didn't need to speak; her orders were understood silently, her direction strong as you followed her through the halls.
